playlist_strategy: A high-octane progression designed specifically for intense sprint intervals. The playlist flows through a pre-run warmup, progressively escalating into explosive high-BPM peaks to match maximum effort phases, sustaining relentless momentum before naturally concluding with a controlled down-tempo cooldown.

tracks.title: Starting Blocks
tracks.youtube_title: Starting Blocks ⚡ Pre-Sprint Warmup Music | Focus & Readiness
tracks.listening_scenario: Stretching and mental preparation before hitting the track
tracks.style_prompt: Atmospheric trap, 110 bpm, C minor, anticipatory groove, deep sub bass, crisp 808 drums, spacious synth textures, cinematic string stabs, hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A sprinter's feet in starting blocks on a professional athletics track, low angle shot, early morning cool blue lighting, high contrast, focused cinematic atmosphere
tracks.youtube_description: Get your mind and body ready for explosive speed. 'Starting Blocks' is the perfect atmospheric trap instrumental for stretching, mental focus, and pre-sprint preparation. Let the deep bass and crisp 808s lock you into the zone before you hit top gear.

tracks.title: First Stride
tracks.youtube_title: First Stride ⚡ High Energy Activation Music | Warmup to Sprint
tracks.listening_scenario: Light jogging and dynamic stretching to activate fast-twitch muscles
tracks.style_prompt: Future bass, midtempo, 125 bpm, G minor, driving groove, thick reese bass, punchy kick drums, euphoric saw synth chords, rhythmic vocal chops, hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A runner in motion, blurred background indicating increasing speed, neon purple and blue cyberpunk aesthetics, glowing athletic shoes, dynamic motion blur
tracks.youtube_description: Transition from stretching to moving. 'First Stride' brings future bass energy to activate your muscles and get the blood pumping. The 125 BPM groove is perfectly calibrated for dynamic warmups and light jogging before the intense intervals begin.

tracks.title: Velocity Spike
tracks.youtube_title: Velocity Spike ⚡ Explosive Sprint Interval Music | Maximum Speed
tracks.listening_scenario: First set of high-intensity sprint intervals
tracks.style_prompt: Electro house, 135 bpm, F minor, relentless groove, distorted electro bass, hard hitting four-on-the-floor kick, sharp synth plucks, aggressive risers, immediate explosive hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A close-up of a track athlete mid-stride breaking through a digital sound barrier, glowing orange energy trails, intense speed visualization, dark stadium background
tracks.youtube_description: Ignite your speed with 'Velocity Spike'. This 135 BPM electro house track is engineered for your first intense sprint interval. Explosive basslines and aggressive synths push you to hit maximum velocity instantly. Time to break your own records.

tracks.title: Adrenaline Rush
tracks.youtube_title: Adrenaline Rush ⚡ Aggressive Workout Music | Push Harder
tracks.listening_scenario: Sustaining speed through grueling mid-workout sprint sets
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial techno, 140 bpm, D minor, pounding mechanical groove, rumbling distorted bass, heavy industrial percussion, screaming acid 303 synths, rhythmic white noise, aggressive driving hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A gritty industrial running track inside an abandoned warehouse, dark crimson lighting cutting through smoke, heavy mechanical atmosphere, high contrast and raw texture
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the pace punishing with 'Adrenaline Rush'. Pure 140 BPM industrial techno designed to push you through the pain barrier during grueling sprint intervals. The relentless mechanical rhythm forces your legs to keep moving at maximum capacity.

tracks.title: Breakaway
tracks.youtube_title: Breakaway ⚡ Peak Sprint Training Music | Outrun the Competition
tracks.listening_scenario: Hitting absolute top speed on the hardest interval
tracks.style_prompt: Liquid Drum & Bass, 174 bpm, E minor, hyper-kinetic groove, deep rumbling reese bass, frantic amen break drum pattern, uplifting liquid synth melodies, high-speed hi-hats, massive euphoric drop within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A sprinter crossing a finish line made of shattered glass, laser green and electric yellow speed lines radiating outward, triumphant victorious pose, high speed action photography
tracks.youtube_description: Reach your absolute breaking point. At 174 BPM, 'Breakaway' is pure Drum & Bass adrenaline engineered for peak sprint velocity. This is the track for your fastest, hardest, most explosive interval. Don't look back, just outrun the competition.

tracks.title: Hyperdrive
tracks.youtube_title: Hyperdrive ⚡ Insane 180 BPM Workout Music | Maximum Effort
tracks.listening_scenario: Pushing past physical limits during the final sprint peaks
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk Drum & Bass, 180 bpm, F# minor, aggressive syncopated groove, twisted heavily modulated neuro bass, skull-crushing drum breaks, glitchy distorted FX, dark stabbing synths, aggressive complex bass design hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: Abstract representation of pure speed, cyan digital warp tunnel, intense motion blur, hyper-drive aesthetic, high contrast black background with glowing geometric speed lines
tracks.youtube_description: Welcome to Hyperdrive. 180 BPM of dark, twisty Neurofunk designed to extract your absolute maximum effort. When your lungs are burning and you want to quit, this relentless track will force your feet to keep turning over. Elite speed required.

tracks.title: Final Straight
tracks.youtube_title: Final Straight ⚡ Epic Hardstyle Sprint Music | Finish Strong
tracks.listening_scenario: The final 100 meters of the last brutal sprint interval
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric hardstyle, 150 bpm, A minor, massive stomping groove, distorted punchy gated kicks, huge layered supersaw synth leads, epic background choirs, deep cinematic impacts, huge mainstage festival hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A stadium bathed in golden sunset light, a runner crossing the finish line tape with pure triumph, fiery red flare smoke in the background, epic cinematic sports photography
tracks.youtube_description: You're on the final straight. 'Final Straight' delivers euphoric 150 BPM Hardstyle energy for that last, agonizing sprint. Let the massive supersaw synths and pounding gated kicks carry you across the finish line. Empty the tank and finish strong!

tracks.title: Momentum Ride
tracks.youtube_title: Momentum Ride ⚡ Driving Tech House | Active Recovery
tracks.listening_scenario: Catching your breath and keeping the legs moving between heavy sprints
tracks.style_prompt: Tech house, 128 bpm, B minor, infectious rolling groove, thick rhythmic bassline, shuffling 16th note hi-hats, percussive synth plucks, hypnotic vocal loop, instant infectious club hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A runner maintaining a steady jog on a cool evening track, teal and magenta urban city lights reflecting on the sleek surface, rhythmic and smooth motion
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the momentum going during active recovery. 'Momentum Ride' provides a steady 128 BPM Tech House groove to help regulate your breathing while keeping your muscles warm and moving between explosive sprint intervals. Steady rhythm, unshakeable focus.

tracks.title: Oxygen Return
tracks.youtube_title: Oxygen Return ⚡ Deep House Cooldown Music | Breathe & Recover
tracks.listening_scenario: Bringing the heart rate down during the final lap walk
tracks.style_prompt: Deep house, 118 bpm, E major, relaxed steady groove, smooth deep sub bass, gentle soft claps, warm rhodes piano chords, lush expansive atmospheric pads, calming melodic hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: An athlete walking it off on the track, hands on hips, breathing deeply, soft morning light in mint and white tones, calm post-workout relief
tracks.youtube_description: The hard work is done. Let your heart rate drop with 'Oxygen Return'. This smooth 118 BPM Deep House track is the perfect sonic backdrop for walking a cooldown lap, catching your breath, and reflecting on a brutal sprint session successfully dominated.

tracks.title: Runner's High
tracks.youtube_title: Runner's High ⚡ Chill Synthwave | Post-Sprint Stretching
tracks.listening_scenario: Static stretching and feeling the endorphin rush post-workout
tracks.style_prompt: Chill synthwave, 90 bpm, Db major, relaxed retro groove, warm fretless bass, nostalgic linndrum beat, lush analog synth arpeggios, heavy reverb washes, emotive nostalgic hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental
tracks.image_prompt: A silhouette of an athlete stretching against a beautiful retro 80s synthwave sunset, glowing orange and deep purple sky, peaceful satisfaction, vaporwave aesthetics
tracks.youtube_description: Bask in the endorphins. 'Runner's High' delivers a nostalgic, 90 BPM chill synthwave atmosphere perfect for your post-sprint static stretching. Let the retro analog synths wash over you as you recover. You earned this.
